_comment: Generated from mainDiagram.puml, then normalized by fix_oneblock_expeditions.py. Known typo expedition IDs, invalid item IDs, and display-style mob names were corrected. Crystal recipe costs still use ExpeditionPoint. Branching unlocks remain in CompletionRewards.Random.
_category_note: Categories manually sorted into Surface, Underground, Forest, Ocean, Desert, Ice, Fire, Jungle, Mystic, and Dungeon. Dungeon is reserved for generator dungeon entries.
